extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: against the Company (criminal Nil, tax 6, statutory/regulatory 2), against subsidiaries (criminal Nil, tax 5, statutory/regulatory Nil), against directors (criminal 4), and against promoters (tax 1); all 'By' rows were excluded, and the promoter tax matter was excluded from the company/subsidiary tax count. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiaries is taken from the stated table amounts of ₹354.91 million and ₹11.33 million, respectively, totaling ₹366.24 million; the non-quantifiable matters were not added. Contingent liabilities are sourced from the stated bank-guarantees-outstanding figure of ₹3.91 million as of September 30, 2025, the latest date shown, rather than summed. Company-wide top-customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2025, is 43.35% for the top five and 58.71% for the top ten, measured against revenue from operations. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million; conversion to crore is by dividing by 10, so ₹366.24 million = ₹36.624 crore and ₹3.91 million = ₹0.391 crore.
